thirdParty.inner_text: StrategyReinventing the revenue river: a conversation with Kueez’ Ziv MishanIn this Q&A, Rob Beeler joins with Ziv Mishan, Kueez CRO, to unpack that challenge. Together, they explore what happens when a publisher’s “main river” begins to dry, how to identify and activate underutilized assets, and which strategic moves publishers should make before crisis forces their hand.Ziv MishanDec 15. 2025
thirdParty.inner_html:
Strategy

Reinventing the revenue river: a conversation with Kueez’ Ziv Mishan

In this Q&A, Rob Beeler joins with Ziv Mishan, Kueez CRO, to unpack that challenge. Together, they explore what happens when a publisher’s “main river” begins to dry, how to identify and activate underutilized assets, and which strategic moves publishers should make before crisis forces their hand.
Ziv Mishan
Dec 15. 2025

thirdParty.inner_text: StrategyRevenue Diversification for PublishersRelying on a single revenue stream is no longer sustainable for publishers. Revenue diversification is essential to reduce risk, offset traffic and CPM pressure, and build long-term resilience.Ziv MishanDec. 11, 2025

Strategy

Revenue Diversification for Publishers

Ziv Mishan
Dec. 11, 2025
